facts.summary: Seven stage prompts: analyze.md, audit.md, discover.md, fix.md, generate.md, plan.md, update-impact.md.
Nine JSON schemas: audit-index, audit-page, component, evidence-artifact, evidence-index, manifest, system, update-plan, workflow.
project-template ships README.md plus dirs: audit/, config/, evidence/, model/, plan/, prompts/, runs/, schemas/, state/.
evidence-artifact.schema.json requires schemaVersion, id, kind, scope, facts[]; each fact requires id, classification in {FACT,INFERENCE,UNKNOWN}, summary, and source.path.
evidence-index.schema.json requires schemaVersion, generatedAt, artifacts[] where each artifact has id, path, kind, scope.
